title: PVP-Friendly End Crystals
description: Makes end crystals vibrant orange (only entity) and removes all explosion particles for visibility and optimized PVP.
body:
# This Only Affects The Entity!
Makes those end crystals you always use, bright orange, for good visibility.

**Speaking of good visibility, this pack removes every explosion particle.**

_The enchanting table language text on the crystal has been coloured black and grey, in case you think the crystal is red concrete._
